mnemonics: Make Dirty Add Column More Often Daily
Magical Dragons Always Collect Money Overly Daily
keyPoints: To add a column for commission with domain to the Employee table,
First, create a new column in the table using the ALTER TABLE statement.
Use the ADD COLUMN clause to specify the column name and data type.
In this case, we want to add a column for commission, so we use the decimal data type.
Next, define the domain for the commission column to ensure data integrity.
Use the CHECK constraint to specify the allowed values for the commission column.
Finally, commit the changes to the database.
